title: Lipids annotation of Nano-DESI MSI datasets
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5iv05","text":"Scope: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6f6g4","text":"Annotate lipid species detected by Nano-DESI IMS analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"avk5r","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"v8ov","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2aucp","text":"Expected Outcome:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9s6ii","text":"A list of lipid identifications with low mass errors (\u003c5 ppm) that correlate to ion images produced by Nano-DESI IMS analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Create mass list from the averaged spectrum.

Use LIPIDMAPS database to annotate each m/z value with the following search criteria: https://www.lipidmaps.org/resources/tools/bulk_structure_searches.php?database=COMP_DB 1a. Positive Mode Adducts: [M+H]+, [M+Na]+, [M+K]+ 1b. Negative Mode Adducts: [M-H]- 2. Specify Mass Tolerance: 0.005 m/z 3. Specify Chains: Even Chains Only
Obtain DDA MS/MS data from each sample.
Use the diagnostic fragements and characteristic neutral loss to narrow down the peak assignment. Remove the assigments that does not match with the CID spectrum.
Calculate ppm error associated with each assignment and remove assignments with errors larger than 5 ppm, although most have errors lower than 3 ppm.
creator: yang1832
